what_it_does: Records metadata for a JPEG image asset named capital-raise/p-21 in the design-source channel, identifying it as source design ground-truth.
observations: Frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob reference, mime type, name, zero width/height, source label, author session, creation timestamp, and an empty links list.
The body states the image is 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-21.jpg'.
Width and height are both 0, suggesting dimensions were not extracted or are placeholders.
The file has no code symbols.
standouts: Explicitly tagged as design ground-truth source material.
conventions: Markdown with YAML frontmatter for asset metadata.
Uses image://design-source URI scheme for the asset address.
Includes a blob reference and a source provenance field.
concerns: Zero width/height may indicate incomplete metadata extraction.
No links or relationships are recorded in the links array.
notes: A ledger stub for a design-source JPEG used as ground truth in the capital-raise flow, with placeholder dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: What does the blob reference resolve to and where is it stored?
How is this image used by capital-raise/p-21?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source ground-truth image; actual content is a metadata stub with no extracted dimensions and no links, so it identifies the asset but does not yet describe its usage.
intention_signals: To create a durable, addressable record of an original design image so downstream tools can locate, version, and treat it as authoritative source material.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for a design-source JPEG, including a blob reference and provenance label that a fused system can use to locate and treat the image as source ground truth.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source JPEG capital-raise/p-21, tagged as source design ground truth with a blob reference and zero recorded dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an original design image asset so it can be referenced as authoritative ground truth within the capital-raise channel.
